channel.title: Xiaomi 17 Max MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 17 Max MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.307.0.WAFCNXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 17 Max China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17 Max China

Codename: byron

Version: OS3.0.307.0.WAFCNXM | 16.0

Size: 11.5 GB

MD5: 696a7139d5417610a9c27e4e4eaa4dfc

Changelog:
[System]
Optimization: Fingerprint recording process
Optimization: Home screen swipe smoothness in some scenarios
Fix: PDF documents weren't fully displayed in some cases
Fix: Images opened by tapping the lower left corner preview in Camera appeared blurry
Fix: Video playback lagged in some third party apps
Fix: Noise appeared on live moments in some cases
Fix: Couldn't activate ICCOA digital car keys in some cases
Fix: Improved system stability and user experience
[Camera]
Optimization: Camera stability
Fix: Camera could lag after restarting

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.307.0.WAFCNXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 17 Max China
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17 Max China

Codename: byron

Version: OS3.0.307.0.WAFCNXM | 16.0

Size: 8.8 GB

MD5: be99c1047e96c25a1643d31822a0c46c

Changelog:
[System]
Optimization: Fingerprint recording process
Optimization: Home screen swipe smoothness in some scenarios
Fix: PDF documents weren't fully displayed in some cases
Fix: Images opened by tapping the lower left corner preview in Camera appeared blurry
Fix: Video playback lagged in some third party apps
Fix: Noise appeared on live moments in some cases
Fix: Couldn't activate ICCOA digital car keys in some cases
Fix: Improved system stability and user experience
[Camera]
Optimization: Camera stability
Fix: Camera could lag after restarting

Download: Here
